name: logfit
description: N분할 순환 루틴 기반 PWA 운동 일지 모바일 앱

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html logfit-core.js manifest.json sw.js chart.umd.min.js code_artifact.html icon.svg favicon.svg favicon-16.png favicon-32.png icon-192.png icon-512.png www/
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:test: npm run android:sync && ./android/gradlew -p android testDebugUnitTest lintDebug
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm run android:sync && ./android/gradlew -p android clean testDebugUnitTest lintDebug assembleDebug bundleRelease
scripts.release:bundle:signed: npm run android:sync && ./android/gradlew -p android verifyReleaseSigningConfig bundleRelease
